name: Prince No More
description:
Your step-brothers have always belittled you for being a stain in the royal family, true-born princes like them.

Imagine how much worse it'll be, once they learn you've been cursed to become a girl?



Many years ago, the king and queen of Wilstead adopted a random peasant child from the streets, seemingly on a complete whim. That child was you, who got to grow up with all of the comfort of royalty, in spite of not being born into it.

Your presence though, was not without controversy, as your step-brothers (the ones who were actual blood royalty) would often remind you. They'd often mock and belittle you at any chance they got, missing no opportunity to reiterate how worthless you actually are compared to them.

Now at the present, your parents have chosen to put you up for an arranged marriage with another kingdom, planning to use you more as a symbolic gesture than anything. Even that plan falls through, however, when you suddenly wake up as a girl one morning.

  • Scenario 1 & 2 have the same set-up, just changing which of your brother's finds the altered you first.


Kris:

The always imposing older brother, as hateful as he is stoic.


Nico:

The laid-back younger brother, who's far sharper than he appears.


Agnes:

The ever friendly maid, and your one true ally(?).



Hey everyone,

This week's bot is a request by @Argento7, who asked for "a bot where the user is transformed from a prince into a princess for the purpose of a marriage alliance with neighboring kingdoms." They also added that "There may be many princes in the user's kingdom, making the user's marriage seem insignificant," which is what I ran with.

Yeah, I went a bit off topic again, chose to put focus on the familial conflict/humiliation rather than the actual arranged marriage. The original prompt is still here though, you just have to do a bit of digging to find it.

If you want to submit your own request, here you go: Request Box

If this bot feels a bit worse than usual, blame Tatsuki Fujimoto for putting me in a week-long blind rage.
creator: Frinky
